title: Distributive conditional — `Wrap<string | number>` → `{w:string} | {w:number}`
description: When a conditional type is applied to a generic union, TS distributes the conditional over each member, producing a union of the per-arm results. `T extends any ? {w: T} : never` applied to `string | number` resolves to `{w: string} | {w: number}`. Validator dispatches through the union emit.
pureType:
type Wrap<T> = T extends any ? {w: T} : never;
return createValidate<Wrap<string | number>>();
generated: function YOw_V71bjVP(v){return ((typeof v === 'object' && v !== null && ((typeof v === 'object' && v !== null && typeof v.w === 'string') || (typeof v === 'object' && v !== null && Number.isFinite(v.w)))))}
